$comment: Single source of truth for the eval model matrix. Add a model here and it joins the sweep with no code change. `executors` is the matrix run-pipeline.mjs and the unit benchmarks sweep (weakest -> strongest). `judge` is held CONSTANT across the whole matrix so Build-Readiness scores are comparable down a column. `dir_aliases` maps the skill-creator workspace `model-<x>` directory names to real model ids so aggregate-unit.mjs can record the actual model instead of the `<model-name>` placeholder.
